title: Waters Corporation Appoints Richard Fearon to Board of Directors
text: MILFORD, Mass.--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- #life_science_tools--Waters Corporation announced the appointment of former Eaton Corporation executive Richard Fearon to its Board of Directors.

title: 2 Instruments Stocks to Watch From a Challenging Industry
text: The Zacks Instruments - Scientific industry participants like Mettler-Toledo (MTD) and Waters (WAT) are gaining from strong life science, pharmaceutical and academic end-market demand despite the challenging macroeconomic environment.

title: Waters (WAT) Launches Alliance iS, Expands HPLC Offerings
text: Waters (WAT) unveils HPLC System called Alliance iS to strengthen the liquid chromatography instruments business.

title: Waters (WAT) Expands TA Segment Offerings With New Solution
text: Waters (WAT) unveils its Battery Cycler Microcalorimeter Solution to strengthen its TA instrument division.

title: Waters Corporation Listed as No. 5 on Barron's 100 Most Sustainable Companies 2023 List
text: MILFORD, Mass.--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- #ESG--Waters Corporation's (NYSE:WAT) companywide commitment to “leaving the world better than we found it” has earned it the number five ranking on the Barron's 2023 100 Most Sustainable Companies U.S. list – its third consecutive year on the list, and its second time amongst the top ten. Waters has a strong focus on making progress against a set of environmental, social, and governance (ESG) goals.

title: Waters: Great Growth Gem, A Bit Pricey
text: Waters is a very interesting long-term steady growth gem, combining bolt-on dealmaking with organic growth and continued share buybacks. This is to be applauded, although shares are awarded a current steep 27 times forward multiple.
